nasb.text: But if he did not lie in wait for him, but God let him fall into his hand, then I will appoint you a place to which he may flee.

esv.text: But if he did not lie in wait for him, but God let him fall into his hand, then I will appoint for you a place to which he may flee.

cnv.text: 人若不是蓄意殺人，而是　神交在他手中的，我就給你設立一個地方，他可以逃到那裡去。

ccb.text: 倘若不是故意杀人，而是上帝许可那人死在他手里，他就可以逃往我指定的地方。
